validationResults.title: CSRF explicit disable not documented in SecurityWebFilterChain
validationResults.evidence: Decision 5 now states: 'CSRF is explicitly disabled (stateless REST API). Spring Security 6 WebFlux enables CSRF protection by default — for a stateless REST API this must be disabled explicitly, otherwise all non-GET requests return 403.'

validationResults.title: Docker ports exposed on 0.0.0.0 instead of 127.0.0.1
validationResults.evidence: Decision 9 now states: 'ports bound to 127.0.0.1 (e.g. 127.0.0.1:27017:27017)' with explicit rationale about preventing unauthenticated MongoDB/Redis from being accessible to other machines on the local network.

validationResults.title: Gitleaks soft-failure not acknowledged as accepted risk
validationResults.evidence: Risk row now reads: 'Hook exits 0 with a warning (soft failure) — chosen to not block git commit for new devs who haven't installed it yet. Accepted risk: no CI-side compensating scan in Epic 01 (deferred). docs/local-setup.md provides install instructions.'

validationResults.title: Security rule ordering (permitAll before anyExchange) not documented
validationResults.evidence: Decision 5 now states: 'Rule ordering is first-match: pathMatchers("/health").permitAll() must appear before anyExchange().authenticated() — swapping them causes all requests including /health to require auth.'

validationResults.title: *.pem, *.p12, *.jks patterns missing from .gitignore AC
validationResults.evidence: AC item now explicitly lists: '*.pem, *.p12, *.jks' as required .gitignore entries alongside .env, *.key, secrets/.
